special_mechanics.name: Vertical Scrolling Shooter Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Game is a vertically scrolling shooter with aircraft controls, not a platformer. Player controls armored aircraft navigating through levels.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Air-to-air weapons (lasers) for aerial opponents and air-to-ground weapons (missiles) for ground enemies. Weapons lost on death with player respawn near death point.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative/empirical data only. Alpha Mission is a shmup (scrolling shooter), not a platformer with traditional jump physics. Available sources (TCRF and Wikipedia) contain no quantitative movement physics data. Documentation focuses on game history, release dates, and gameplay mechanics rather than technical physics parameters.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Alpha Mission (NES)
